document.title: RIO Protocol Specification
document.authority: Rio Gateway v3.0 — Sovereign Gate Edition

asymmetric_signature.signed_message: UTF-8 byte encoding of the intent string

accepted_formats.name: Full PEM with proper newlines
accepted_formats.detection: Contains '-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----' with embedded newlines

accepted_formats.name: Replit-collapsed PEM
accepted_formats.detection: Contains '-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----' with spaces instead of newlines
accepted_formats.normalization: Base64 body extracted, whitespace stripped, re-wrapped at 64 chars per line

accepted_formats.name: Bare base64 body
accepted_formats.detection: No PEM headers; matches base64 character set
accepted_formats.normalization: Reconstructed into '-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----' / '-----END PUBLIC KEY-----' wrapper

accepted_formats.name: Hex-encoded point
accepted_formats.detection: Matches [0-9a-fA-F]+ and length is 66 (compressed) or 130 (uncompressed) characters
accepted_formats.normalization: Decoded from hex directly to curve point

RIO_PRIVATE_KEY.security: NEVER logged, NEVER included in any response, NEVER exposed outside signing functions

accepted_formats.name: Replit-collapsed PEM
accepted_formats.detection: Contains '-----BEGIN' with spaces instead of newlines
accepted_formats.normalization: Body extracted, re-wrapped at 64 chars per line

accepted_formats.name: Bare base64 body
accepted_formats.normalization: Wrapped with '-----BEGIN EC PRIVATE KEY-----' / '-----END EC PRIVATE KEY-----'

RIO_SERVICE_TOKEN.purpose: Shared HMAC key for post-execution ledger signatures

RIO_PROXY_TOKEN.purpose: Alternative Bearer token for service-protected endpoints
RIO_PROXY_TOKEN.note: Functionally equivalent to RIO_SERVICE_TOKEN for token auth; either one being valid is sufficient

key_fingerprint.note: First 16 hexadecimal characters of the full SHA-256 digest

fields.name: intent
fields.description: Natural-language instruction for the AI model

fields.name: signature
fields.description: Base64-encoded DER ECDSA signature over the intent

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the signature was produced

fields.name: model
fields.description: Preferred model: 'claude', 'chatgpt', or 'gemini'. Auto-detected if omitted.

fields.name: payload
fields.description: Supplementary context. payload.context (if present) appended to intent during grammar calibration.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Caller-supplied metadata. Stored but not processed.

fields.name: nonce
fields.description: Single-use token for replay-attack prevention. Strongly RECOMMENDED.

fields.name: execution_token
fields.description: Gate token. All execution is blocked without this field.

success_response_fields.name: model_used
success_response_fields.description: Model identifier that handled the request

success_response_fields.name: signature_hash
success_response_fields.description: SHA-256 hex of raw DER signature bytes

success_response_fields.name: timestamp
success_response_fields.description: ISO-8601 UTC when the response was produced

ordered_steps.name: Signature Hash Computation and Atomic DB Claim

outcomes.success: Row inserted in used_signatures; pipeline continues

ordered_steps.name: Sovereign Gate
ordered_steps.description: ECDSA signature verification on the raw intent string

ordered_steps.name: Execution Gate (check_gate)
ordered_steps.description: Validates execution_token against canonical gate parameters (5-guard sequence)

ordered_steps.name: Rio Grammar Calibration
ordered_steps.note: Context appended only if payload.context is present and non-empty

ordered_steps.name: Model Routing
ordered_steps.description: Resolve explicit model field or apply intent keyword matching

ordered_steps.name: Post-Execution Ledger (asynchronous)
ordered_steps.note: Fire-and-forget. MUST NOT delay the HTTP response. Failures are logged but do not propagate.

ordered_steps.name: In-Memory Response Ledger Commit
ordered_steps.description: Appends hash-chained entry; produces receipt_hash and ledger_index returned to caller

sovereign_gate.description: Outermost cryptographic checkpoint. Validates four properties in strict order, failing closed.

checks.name: Timestamp Freshness
checks.condition: abs(now_utc - timestamp) <= SIGNATURE_WINDOW_SECONDS AND timestamp parseable

checks.name: Signature Validity
checks.condition: base64_decode(signature) is valid DER ECDSA over UTF-8_encode(intent) using RIO_PUBLIC_KEY

checks.name: Nonce Enforcement
checks.condition: If nonce present: not previously claimed in Nonce Registry

signature_registry.description: Signature-level single-use enforcement. Distinct from Nonce Registry.
signature_registry.storage: SQLite — used_signatures table in gateway.db (WAL mode). Survives restarts.
claim_procedure: 2. Evict all rows where expires_at <= Unix_now
3. Query for existing row with signature_hash
5. If not found → INSERT(signature_hash, intent, used_at, expires_at = now + TTL) → True
6. IntegrityError on INSERT → treat as concurrent replay → HTTP 409

nonce_registry.storage: In-memory only. Does NOT survive restarts.
claim_procedure: 1. Evict all nonces whose expiry has passed
2. If nonce in store → False (replay → HTTP 401)

execution_gate.description: Inner hard gate guarding AI model invocation. Operates independently of Sovereign Gate.

gate_parameters.intent: Copied verbatim from intake request intent field
gate_parameters.source: Copied verbatim from intake request source field
gate_parameters.timestamp: Copied verbatim from intake request timestamp field

guards.name: Required Fields
guards.condition: intent, source, and timestamp all present and non-empty

guards.name: Timestamp Freshness
guards.condition: timestamp parseable ISO-8601 AND abs(now_utc - timestamp) <= SIGNATURE_WINDOW_SECONDS

guards.name: ECDSA Signature
guards.condition: base64_decode(execution_token) is valid DER ECDSA over canonical_bytes using RIO_PUBLIC_KEY

on_any_guard_failure: Row written to gate_log with event='unauthorized execution attempt'
Row written to execution_ledger with result='blocked' and reason=<reason_code>

inputs.current_utc: ISO-8601 UTC at time of gate passage

receipt_hash_formula.formula:
receipt_data = 'GATE_PASSED|' + intent_id + '|' + source + '|' + current_utc_iso
receipt_hash = SHA-256(UTF-8_encode(receipt_data))

on_success_logging: Row written to gate_log with event='gate_passed'
Row written to execution_ledger with result='executed' and reason='gate_passed'

execution_token.description: Short-lived ECDSA signature over canonical gate parameters. Generated server-side.

generation.step_1: timestamp = current_utc_iso (use this timestamp in the subsequent intake request)

generation_response.timestamp: <ISO-8601 UTC — MUST be used as timestamp in intake request>

execution_token.expiry: Valid for SIGNATURE_WINDOW_SECONDS from its timestamp (enforced by Guard 2)
execution_token.critical_note: The timestamp from token generation MUST be used unchanged in the intake request. Any difference in timestamp causes canonical encoding mismatch and Guard 5 rejection.

model_routing.note: Keyword matching is case-insensitive on the calibrated intent string

in_memory_response_ledger.description: Append-only hash chain recording every successful AI execution within the process lifetime. Does NOT survive restarts.

entry_fields.name: prev_hash
entry_fields.description: receipt_hash of previous entry, or 'GENESIS' for first

entry_fields.name: response_chars
entry_fields.description: Character length of the AI response

entry_fields.name: timestamp
entry_fields.description: ISO-8601 UTC at ledger commit time

receipt_hash_formula.formula:
data = prev_hash + '|' + source + '|' + intent + '|' + model + '|' + response[:500] + '|' + timestamp
receipt_hash = SHA-256(UTF-8_encode(data))
receipt_hash_formula.note: Only the first 500 characters of the AI response are included in the hash input

in_memory_response_ledger.integrity_check: receipt_hash of row N becomes prev_hash of row N+1

execution_ledger.description: Primary tamper-evident audit log in gateway.db. One row per check_gate call (pass or block).

columns.name: id
columns.description: Row identifier

columns.name: action
columns.description: Always 'check_gate'

columns.name: agent
columns.description: AI model identifier or empty string if not yet resolved

columns.name: approver
columns.description: Key fingerprint (SHA-256(RIO_PUBLIC_KEY)[:16])

columns.name: executed_by
columns.description: Value of source from intake request

columns.name: intent_id
columns.description: SHA-256(UTF-8_encode(intent))

columns.name: parameters_hash
columns.description: SHA-256(canonical_bytes)

columns.name: result
columns.description: 'executed' if gate passed; 'blocked' if any guard failed

columns.name: reason
columns.description: 'gate_passed' on success; reason code on failure

columns.name: receipt_hash
columns.description: Gate receipt hash on success; empty string on failure

columns.name: prev_hash
columns.description: entry_hash of the previous row, or 'GENESIS'

columns.name: entry_hash
columns.description: SHA-256 seal of this row

columns.name: timestamp
columns.description: ISO-8601 UTC when the row was written

entry_hash_formula.formula:
seal_data = action + '|' + agent + '|' + approver + '|' + executed_by + '|' + intent_id + '|' + parameters_hash + '|' + result + '|' + reason + '|' + receipt_hash + '|' + prev_hash + '|' + timestamp
entry_hash = SHA-256(UTF-8_encode(seal_data))

chain_integrity.rule: prev_hash of row N MUST equal entry_hash of row N-1 (by id order)

execution_ledger.failure_semantics: Write failures are logged but MUST NOT interrupt gate logic. Failure returns empty string for entry_hash.

post_execution_ledger.description: Records the outcome of each AI execution after it completes. HMAC-signed. Written asynchronously.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Row identifier

columns.name: timestamp
columns.description: ISO-8601 UTC when AI execution completed

columns.name: approver
columns.description: Key fingerprint (SHA-256(RIO_PUBLIC_KEY)[:16])

columns.name: agent
columns.description: AI model identifier that handled execution

columns.name: executed_by
columns.description: Value of source from intake request

columns.name: policy_result
columns.description: 'success' or 'error:<message>'

columns.name: parameters_hash
columns.description: SHA-256 of canonical gate parameters (from gate receipt)

columns.name: result_hash
columns.description: SHA-256 of raw AI response string

columns.name: ledger_hash
columns.description: SHA-256 chain seal of this entry

columns.name: signature
columns.description: HMAC-SHA256(ledger_hash, RIO_SERVICE_TOKEN)

ledger_hash_formula.formula:
seal_data = timestamp + '|' + approver + '|' + agent + '|' + executed_by + '|' + policy_result + '|' + parameters_hash + '|' + result_hash + '|' + prev_ledger_hash
ledger_hash = SHA-256(UTF-8_encode(seal_data))

chain_integrity.rule: prev_ledger_hash of row N MUST equal ledger_hash of row N-1 (by id order)
chain_integrity.anchor: First row uses 'GENESIS' as prev_ledger_hash in the seal_data computation

post_execution_ledger.failure_semantics: Write failures are logged but MUST NOT delay or affect the HTTP response to the caller.

secondary_link.note: Use when only the intent string is known

http_status_codes.condition: All pipeline steps passed; AI response returned
Sovereign Gate: timestamp expired, bad/missing signature, nonce replay
Execution Gate: any of the 5 guards failed
Signature replay: same signature hash already used
Infrastructure failure: key not configured, signature registry unavailable, nonce registry error

reason_code_glossary.meaning: One or more required fields absent

approver_fingerprint.description: Compute the approver field from RIO_PUBLIC_KEY

inputs.intent: Summarise the three laws of thermodynamics.

execution_ledger_entry_hash.description: Compute entry_hash for a blocked gate attempt (first row)

post_execution_ledger_hash_and_hmac.description: Compute ledger_hash and signature for the first successful post-exec row

inputs.intent: Summarise the three laws of thermodynamics.
inputs.response: The three laws are...  (first 500 chars used)

steps: data         = 'GENESIS|manus|Summarise the three laws of thermodynamics.|claude|The three laws are...|2026-03-26T14:00:05.100000Z'
in_memory_response_ledger_first_entry.note: The second entry's prev_hash equals this receipt_hash

steps: // signature_hash is the PRIMARY KEY in used_signatures
